title: CDF Template Manifest
description: Manifest for a CDF infrastructure template package. Placed at the template root directory (e.g. platform/cas/v2pub/cdf-template.json).

name.description: Template name matching the directory name (e.g. 'cas', 'intg', 'microservices').

version.description: Template version identifier matching the directory name (e.g. 'v2pub', 'v2net'). This is the template variant/architecture, not a semver.

release.description: Semantic version for the release lifecycle of this template (e.g. '2.1.0', '2.1.0-pre.1').

providedFeatures.description: Feature flags this template can enable. Declares the capability set — actual activation is determined by the config at deploy time.

dependencies.description: Template dependencies keyed by '<scope>/<name>/<version>' (e.g. 'platform/cas/v2pub'). Each value specifies the required release range and features.

release.description: Semver range for the required release (e.g. '>=2.0.0', '^2.1.0').

requiredFeatures.description: Feature flags the dependency template must provide (must be in its providedFeatures).
